head: dd46907
remediationProgress: Phase 0 gate rescue complete: roadmap filename/index fixed, replay middleware typecheck fixed, AGENTS.md synchronized, Prettier drift cleared.
Incident-drill validator and PagerDuty dry-run simulation now read alertmanager.yml.tpl, matching the rendered Alertmanager config source.
S1-001 replay traversal closed: exemption matching now normalizes paths and rejects raw or decoded parent traversal before static-path exemptions.
S1-002/S1-003 audit bundle tenant binding closed: budget checks and audit-bundle.received records now use tenant scope derived from the signed DID, not x-gtcx-tenant-id.
remainingGaps: Auth-failure events use tenantId unknown and are filtered out of tenant-scoped exception views.
Auth-failure throttle is process-local, unbounded, and trusts X-Forwarded-For without trusted-proxy validation.
Compliance catalog verification uses the embedded public key instead of a pinned trust anchor.
failClosed and budget-store primitives are not wired into production hot paths.
Node runtime floor is inconsistent across package manifests and CI workflows.
Alertmanager PagerDuty/Slack development defaults still need an explicit staging/production fail-closed guard.
Audit and remediation artifacts remain uncommitted in the current working tree.
External assurance remains pending; this is an internal audit only.
